chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الرَّغْبَةِ وَ الرَّهْبَةِ وَ التَّضَرُّعِ وَ التَّبَتُّلِ وَ الِابْتِهَالِ وَ الِاسْتِعَاذَةِ وَ الْمَسْأَلَةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 14 – The desire, and the awe, and the beseeching, and the devotion, and the invocation, and the seeking of Refuge, and the asking

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/48)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/48)
text: ا قُلْنَا لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) كَيْفَ الْمَسْأَلَةُ إِلَى اللَّهِ تَبَارَكَ وَ تَعَالَى قَالَ تَبْسُطُ كَفَّيْكَ قُلْنَا كَيْفَ الِاسْتِعَاذَةُ قَالَ تُفْضِي بِكَفَّيْكَ وَ التَّبَتُّلُ الْإِيمَاءُ بِالْإِصْبَعِ وَ التَّضَرُّعُ تَحْرِيكُ الْإِصْبَعِ وَ الِابْتِهَالُ أَنْ تَمُدَّ يَدَيْكَ جَمِيعاً .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Hammad, from Hareyz, from Muhammad Bin Muslim and Zurara who both said,

‘We said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘How is the asking to Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Blessed and High (supposed to be)?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Extending your palms’. We said, ‘How is the seeking of the Refuge (supposed to be)?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Displaying with your palms; and the devotion is the gesturing with the finger; and the beseeching is moving the finger; and the invoking is that you extend your hands together’.
en.sarwar: 7. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from Hammad from Hariz from Muhammad ibn Muslim and Zurara who have said the following: “Zurara has said, ‘Once we asked abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) how to plead before Allah for help?’ The Imam said, ‘Stretch your palms.’ We then asked, ‘How is seeking refuge?’ The Imam said, ‘Turn your palm to Ka’aba, and al-Tabattul is making gestures with your finger. Al-Tadarru ’ is the moving of fingers and al-‘Ibtihal is the stretching out of both hands.’”
